text.title: Project Closure with Lessons Extraction Core Rules

rule.statement: Report MUST quantify outcome vs charter goal with explicit variance + reason; 'success' without variance data is rejected.
rule.rationale: Variance is the seed for lessons; without it, closure is theatre.

rule.statement: Each lesson MUST be phrased as a behaviour change (verb + object + measurable signal); generalities like 'communicate more' are rejected.
rule.rationale: Generalities don't change behaviour; verb+object+signal does.

rule.statement: Each lesson MUST have a named owner accountable for carrying it into the next project.
rule.rationale: Owner-less lessons rot in the report.

rule.statement: Each lesson MUST carry a target adoption date (within the next 90 days); open-ended dates rejected.
rule.rationale: Dates create pressure; open-ended adoption is no adoption.

rule.statement: Lessons MUST be reviewed at next-project kick-off with each lesson marked adopted / partial / abandoned; missing review blocks kick-off.
rule.rationale: Closure-loop is what turns lessons into compounding learning.
